reviews.comment:

In the summer it's impossible to pass through there, as there are traffic jams all day long.

reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención del personal, pese a la demanda y la larga fila te atienden con esmero y dedicación como si fueras el único

(Translated by Google)
The staff provided excellent service; despite the high demand and long queue, they attended to you with care and dedication as if you were the only customer.

reviews.comment:
El personal atiende bien, pero son muy pocos surtidores para ser la única estación de Santa clara y la única en la ruta antes de llegar a mdp.

(Translated by Google)
The staff is helpful, but there are very few pumps for being the only station in Santa Clara and the only one on the route before reaching Mar del Plata.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtemF2UFBBEAE

reviews.comment:
El dueño es una excelente persona lastima que se equivoca a la hora de contratar los empleados. Pesima atencion en los surtidores y en los baños.

(Translated by Google)
The owner is a great person, but it's a shame he makes mistakes when hiring employees. Terrible service at the pumps and in the bathrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMmJxTU1nEAE

reviews.comment:
Pésimo! No me quisieron calentar una mamadera para un bebé. Que clase de gente hace eso?

(Translated by Google)
Terrible! They refused to warm up a baby bottle for me. What kind of people do that?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNta2F6a013EAE
